react_icons.reason: Official icon for Kodi entertainment software integration
Official icon for Plex media server integration
Official icon for VLC media player integration

downloaded_assets.title: Premium Home Theater Setup
downloaded_assets.description: High-end cinematic home theater with a large projection screen and moody ambient lighting
downloaded_assets.visual_description: Wide shot of a luxury entertainment center featuring a massive silver projection screen, high-fidelity tower speakers, and warm amber floor lamps. The room has textured wood-paneled walls and a dark, focused atmosphere.
downloaded_assets.color_notes: Dominant warm amber (#D4845C) from lamps contrasting with deep charcoal and wood tones. Excellent for dark mode UIs with gold/amber accents.
downloaded_assets.alt_text: High-end cinematic home theater setup with large screen and moody lighting
downloaded_assets.why_it_was_chosen: Perfectly matches the 'cinematic dark home theater' request with high-end equipment visibility.

downloaded_assets.title: Minimalist Moody Living Room
downloaded_assets.description: Dimly lit modern living room with a TV and drawn curtains
downloaded_assets.visual_description: Low-light interior shot of a minimalist room with dark curtains. A TV screen is visible in the corner showing static, creating a mysterious and technical mood.
downloaded_assets.color_notes: Very dark palette, near-black (#161817) with subtle grey highlights. Best for extreme dark mode themes.
downloaded_assets.alt_text: Dimly lit room with TV and curtains creating a moody atmosphere
downloaded_assets.why_it_was_chosen: Strong alternative for a more technical/underground feel.

downloaded_assets.title: Smart TV App Interface
downloaded_assets.description: TV screen displaying a grid of streaming service apps in a modern home
downloaded_assets.visual_description: A vibrant TV screen filled with colorful app icons (Netflix, Disney+, etc.) set against a dark background with purple and orange ambient light glows. A tablet and smartphone are in the foreground, suggesting a multi-device technical ecosystem.
downloaded_assets.color_notes: Vibrant neon glows in purple (#B026FF) and orange (#FF8C00) against a dark base. High visual energy.
downloaded_assets.alt_text: Smart TV displaying various streaming applications in a modern high-tech home
downloaded_assets.why_it_was_chosen: Excellent representation of the streaming interface request with modern device context.

downloaded_assets.title: Netflix Interface Close-up
downloaded_assets.description: Close-up focus on a streaming interface on a smart TV
downloaded_assets.visual_description: Sharp selective focus on a TV screen showing a movie selection interface. The background is softly blurred, emphasizing the technical digital content.
downloaded_assets.color_notes: Neutral grey tones (#99959A) with pops of color from the UI icons. Clean and professional.
downloaded_assets.alt_text: Close-up of a streaming interface on a flat screen TV
downloaded_assets.why_it_was_chosen: Good secondary option focusing purely on the screen content.

downloaded_assets.title: Technical Light Streams
downloaded_assets.description: Abstract blue light patterns on a dark background representing data/signal flow
downloaded_assets.visual_description: Dynamic streaks of glowing blue and white light dancing across a deep navy background. Represents high-speed data transfer or IPTV signal streams.
downloaded_assets.color_notes: Deep navy (#0F1628) with electric blue (#007FFF) glows. High contrast, perfect for section backgrounds.
downloaded_assets.alt_text: Abstract glowing blue technical light patterns on a dark background
downloaded_assets.why_it_was_chosen: Provides a high-quality abstract technical background to support the premium mood.

css_textures.description: Subtle dot grid pattern for technical sections
css_textures.recommended_for: The configuration and conversion result panels

css_textures.description: Subtle noise texture for a premium tactile feel
css_textures.recommended_for: Main app container to soften gradients

usage_notes: Prefer SiKodi, SiPlex, and SiVideolan from react-icons for integration logos
Use hero-home-theater-2.jpg as the primary hero background with a dark overlay
Use card-streaming-1.jpg for the main features/demo card
bg-technical-dark.jpg is ideal for the 'How it works' or technical specs section
